headline: MSCI (MSCI) Stock Gets Fair Value Bump As AI Debate Shapes Analyst Views
summary: MSCI’s latest fair value range has been nudged from $688.56 to $690.44 per share, a modest adjustment that reflects updated modeling rather than a sweeping reset. Analysts are weighing how artificial intelligence could shift the economics of data and analytics, balancing confidence in MSCI’s proprietary datasets against questions around more commoditized revenue lines. In the sections that follow, you will see how this evolving narrative takes shape and how to keep track of the key moving...
